nasb.text: He who increases his wealth by interest and usury Gathers it for him who is gracious to the poor.

esv.text: Whoever multiplies his wealth by interest and profit gathers it for him who is generous to the poor.

cnv.text: 凡是藉著高息厚利增加自己財富的， 就是為那恩待窮人的人積蓄。

ccb.text: 人放高利贷牟利， 等于为扶贫者积财。

csbs.text: 用高息厚利使自己财物增多的， 是为恩待贫弱者的人积蓄。
